children.name: RegisterPatient
children.purpose: Register a new patient in the system
children.behavior: Extract patient details from input, validate uniqueness, store in patients data store, and return success or error
postconditions: patient record created in patients data store

inputs.name: patient_data
inputs.description: Patient registration details (name, age, contact, etc.)

outputs.name: registration_result
outputs.description: Result with success status, patient ID, and message

global_vars.description: Write new patient record to patients data store

constraints.description: Patient ID must be unique across the system
All required patient fields must be present and valid

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid patient data, system returns success with unique patient ID
Given duplicate patient data, system returns error indicating patient already exists

children.name: BookAppointment
children.purpose: Book an appointment for a registered patient
children.behavior: Extract patient ID and appointment details from input, verify patient exists, check slot availability, store appointment in appointments data store, and return confirmation
postconditions: appointment record created in appointments data store

inputs.name: appointment_data
inputs.description: Appointment details (patient_id, date, time, doctor, etc.)

outputs.name: booking_result
outputs.description: Result with success status, appointment ID, and message

global_vars.description: Read patient record to verify existence
Write new appointment record to appointments data store

constraints.description: Patient must exist in patients data store
Appointment slot must not be already booked

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid appointment data for existing patient, system returns success with appointment ID
Given non-existent patient, system returns error indicating patient not found
Given already booked slot, system returns error indicating slot unavailable

children.name: GetPatientRecords
children.purpose: Retrieve medical records for a patient
children.behavior: Extract patient ID from input, verify patient exists, read records from patients data store (append-only), and return records

outputs.name: records_result
outputs.description: Result with success status, records list, and message

global_vars.description: Read patient record to verify existence and retrieve records

constraints.description: Patient must exist in patients data store
Records are read-only; no modification allowed

acceptance_criteria.description: Given existing patient ID, system returns success with records list
Given non-existent patient ID, system returns error indicating patient not found

children.name: UpdatePatientProfile
children.behavior: Extract patient ID and updated fields from input, verify patient exists, update profile in patients data store, and return success
postconditions: patient profile updated in patients data store

inputs.name: update_data
inputs.description: Patient ID and updated profile fields

outputs.name: update_result
outputs.description: Result with success status and message

global_vars.description: Read patient record to verify existence, then write updated profile

data_operations.description: Read existing patient record and update profile fields

constraints.description: Patient must exist in patients data store
Only valid profile fields can be updated
Update must be atomic to prevent partial updates

acceptance_criteria.description: Given existing patient ID and valid update fields, system returns success with updated profile
Given non-existent patient ID, system returns error indicating patient not found
Given invalid update fields, system returns error indicating validation failure

governance_notes: All children operate on the patients data store (read/write) and appointments data store (write for BookAppointment). No child introduces new data stores. Global_vars for each child are subsets of the parent's available data stores. Data operations cover the parent's data needs: RegisterPatient writes to patients, BookAppointment reads patients and writes appointments, GetPatientRecords reads patients, UpdatePatientProfile reads and writes patients. No child requires capabilities beyond patients.read, patients.write, appointments.write. Constraints ensure data integrity and uniqueness. Acceptance criteria cover success and error scenarios. Node types are atomic_operation for mutation nodes and pure_function for the query node.
